title: codereview-2: rx_valid_until_sfn mentioned but not in binary format or test vectors (P1)
description: The clarification notes deferral but parent task requires full CCP-9 clarity. File separate task for adding rx_valid_until_sfn to announce header, signed_data, LCI, vectors. Human decision on format.
notes: HUMAN tag confirmed. Adding rx_valid_until_sfn u32 field after Seq Num in announce binary per CCP-9/3i18.4.2. Updating spec, vectors, generate.py, schema. No impl refs in spec. Will run 3 codereview passes, address, test, close.
